items.title: Oil at $150 will trigger global recession, says boss of financial giant BlackRock
items.summary: Larry Fink says if oil prices stay high for a sustained period it will have "profound implications" for the world economy.

items.title: Tough negotiations loom as Denmark's Social Democrats fail to secure a majority

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.
